codeReview.summary: This fix directly resolves the prior blocking SSR mismatch. Compared with original commit b3f6a05 (which only forwarded selected_channel_id and limit), commit 4938092 now parses URL `type` and `ack` and forwards them to `/api/workspace/bootstrap` as `video_type` and `acknowledged` respectively. Behavior is constrained to valid, non-default values and is covered by dedicated server-load tests.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture knowledge is now stale for this path: it still states SSR bootstrap does not forward type/ack URL filters.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:29 says type/ack filters are not forwarded, but commit 4938092 updates frontend/src/routes/+page.server.ts to forward `type` -> `video_type` and `ack` -> `acknowledged`.

summary: Reviewed fix feature fix-ssr-bootstrap-url-filters as a rerun after frontend-ssr-data-loading failure. Transcript skeleton, prior review, original commit b3f6a05, and fix commit 4938092 were examined. Verdict: pass — the original blocking issue (missing SSR forwarding of URL filters) is fully addressed, with regression tests added for valid/default/invalid and combined parameter scenarios.
